title: codereview: Python AnnounceMessage docstring missing current_channel attribute description
description: After renaming field in messages.py:70, the class docstring (lines 47-64) does not document the new current_channel field (range 0-15, purpose for CCP-9 rendezvous). P3 documentation. Should add: current_channel: u8 RX channel announced for CCP-9 peer rendezvous (spec 2a.3). Linked to project-LICHEN-3i18.1. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Fixed all docstring, wire format, constant, and attribute description issues for current_channel in announce messages across Python and Rust impls per CCP completion. Ran 3 independent codereview passes per workflow rule (no P0-P2 findings in final pass). Updated _FIXED_LENGTH, parsing, serialization, tests, and docs to match spec. Quality gates passed. Parallel fixes completed. No CCP left.
